description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a combination of wood and metal construction, featuring a prominent wooden stock, handguard, and pistol grip. The receiver and barrel assembly are made of dark metal, with a curved detachable magazine inserted below the receiver. The rifle has a fixed iron sight system, with the front sight post and rear notch both visible. The muzzle end is equipped with a simple slant compensator or flash hider, and the overall design is robust and utilitarian. The wood components have a warm, reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal parts.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine. Features iron sights and a slant muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel alignment, front sight post, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden components, magazine, and receiver details from the other side.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the length of the rifle, the alignment of the sights, and the width of the stock and handguard.
